title: Common 3-letter words
description: Build real-word fluency with the most common English short words
text: the and had has did dad sad fed jak fee see fad lad add age sit ten ape rat
finger_focus: All learned letters — focus on speed
tips: Short words become muscle memory — type without thinking
Don't pause between letters of the same word
Eyes off keyboard — trust your fingers

character_tips.anna: Common short words are the building blocks. Practice them until they flow.
character_tips.maxim: These are the 100 most-used English words. Speed comes from rhythm, not effort.
character_tips.knopych: TURBO MODE! Short words — short typing! Quick-quick! ⚡
character_tips.klavochka: These tiny words are friends — learn them well, sunshine! 💖
